work_item: HTF-alignment and multi-trigger gate-relaxation sweep (10 scenarios: D1-D5 HTF bonus, H1-H5 trigger quality)
key_finding: Gate injection at evaluate_bearish_setup level adds ZERO marginal trades on J-days. With vix_soft_mode=True, blocked_bars=0 on all 6 J-days -- VIX becomes a score demerit not hard block, so every bar either passes fully or is pre-filtered by quality escalation lock (not evaluate_bearish_setup). The quality escalation lock is the real gate. Wide baseline (vix_soft+OB+25c) already captures 97.3% edge. Gate injection hits wrong choke point. Next directions: HTF-conditioned quality-lock re-entry timer, BEARISH_REVERSAL countertrend class.
